atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain that started four days ago, initially on the right side and now shifting to the left.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as similar to previous kidney stone episodes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports occasional dizziness when exerting himself, particularly with stairs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some body aches, attributing them to favoring his back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some blood in his urine, though it's difficult to detect.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's been diligent with imitrex for migraines and reports no issues with them.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's been taking Tylenol for the back pain but finds it ineffective.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's been ordering take-out and fast food due to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no issues with his acid reflux, though he's been staying hydrated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports favoring his back when walking due to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure is slightly elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart sounds are clear.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals cDA tenderness on the right-hand side and tenderness to palpation in the right lower quadrant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's back pain is most likely a recurrence of kidney stones.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The slightly elevated creatinine

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: pending abdominal x-ray findings

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The dizziness is likely related to the back pain and postural strain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a CT scan without contrast of the abdomen and pelvis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order ultram 50 mg every 6 hours as needed for pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Order a refill of protonix 40 mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule follow-up in one week to review the CT scan results and assess response to treatment.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise the patient to increase oral hydration.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Advise the patient to avoid rapid positional changes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Counsel the patient on the importance of reporting worsening symptoms.
